essence: Collects and analyses forensic evidence from crime scenes to support criminal investigations.

identity.title: Crime Scene Investigator
identity.summary: Processes scenes, collects trace and physical evidence, documents findings, and liaises with forensic laboratories and investigators.

salary.notes: Specialist forensic roles and senior investigators earn higher salaries.

qualifications: Forensic science qualification or relevant technical training
Experience in scene processing and evidence handling
Attention to detail and methodical working practices

lifestyle.description: Shift and on‑call work with exposure to challenging scenes; requires resilience and strict evidence protocols.

habits: Collects and preserves physical and trace evidence
Prepares detailed scene reports and exhibits
Liaises with forensic labs and investigators
